name: Barbara Mikulski
subject: You need to fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Hillary is a fighter | Friend --

Want to know how you get something done? Simple: You fight like hell -- and NEVER give up, no matter what anyone throws in your way.

Don’t believe me? Just look at Hillary Clinton. Back in the 90s, she fought for universal health care, and the Republicans tried to stop her. Did she slip off somewhere and have a good cry? No! She kept fighting, she helped get health care for 8 million kids who needed it, and when she becomes president, you better believe she's going to build on Obamacare to achieve health care for every person in America.

But she needs our help to get there -- and it's going to take all of us fighting together to make it happen.

I know how special this team is -- because of you, Hillary is the first woman ever to clinch a major party’s presidential nomination. And because of you, she’s going to be our first woman president (not to mention one of the best presidents we’ve ever had).

**I hope you’ll chip in $1 today. Show the world that you’re just like Hillary -- you’ll never give up fighting for what you believe in. Together, we’re going to win:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2OTIzODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxMjk1Mzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Barbara Mikulski

name: Ben Carson
subject: I need your feedback for Donald Trump
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/35804810:WYE10oYNB:m:1:876315805:9FC4C77255BF92509D97F39B13ED5E91:r)
---
* * *

Peter,

My Faith Votes is busy preparing for our upcoming forum to facilitate a conversation between Donald Trump and some of our nation's most prominent Christian leaders.

I truly believe it has the potential to be a pivotal moment this election cycle, and through today's email, I hope you will help me as I strive to carry your voice.

**[My role will be to guide this conversation, and I would like to know your question or comment for Donald Trump. You can tell me by going here.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/35804810:WYE10oYNB:m:1:876315805:9FC4C77255BF92509D97F39B13ED5E91:r)**

Our purpose is not an endorsement or collective decision from the faith community, and we certainly don't expect to solve all of our nation's problems in a meeting.

But this will allow a very significant group of faith leaders, along with Mr. Trump, to better understand each other as people, to discuss his vision for the future of America, and to enable him to better understand and appreciate those issues that are most important to people of faith.

**[As people of faith we must make our voices heard and I hope you will take this opportunity to share your question or comment with me now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/35804810:WYE10oYNB:m:1:876315805:9FC4C77255BF92509D97F39B13ED5E91:r)
[
You've been a dedicated supporter and I'd really appreciate your input.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/35804810:WYE10oYNB:m:1:876315805:9FC4C77255BF92509D97F39B13ED5E91:r)**
Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you.
Sincerely,

Ben Carson

body:
Hillary Clinton is the Democratic nominee for President of the United States. That makes our race for Governor
---
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/5472a0a81d5f4249b714fafcfd0b0de3?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=anti_liberal-hillary-clinton&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160608-this-just-in-3611-petition) |
| Friend,

**Hillary Clinton is the Democratic nominee for President of the United States.**

That makes our race for Governor even more crucial because we cannot afford to have her liberal lobyist ally John Gregg push their Clinton-Gregg radical agenda on Hoosiers. John Gregg has stood by Hillary Clinton as she promises to put Hoosier coal miners out of work, which will cost the state thousands of mining and manufacturing jobs, and raise your home electric bill.

**In November, Hoosiers will have a choice to make.** Either we can continue our legacy of commonsense, solutions-based reforms that have made Indiana a model state in the nation or we can elect a Hillary ally who will undo everything we’ve worked so hard to achieve.

[**Stop Hillary Clinton and her Indiana ally John Gregg.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/136fbad691754cc498a1b97c833164ff?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=anti_liberal-hillary-clinton&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160608-this-just-in-3611-petition)

We can make it so that no matter what happens in the Presidential election, we will still have a strong voice in Mike Pence who will stand up for our state’s rights and Hoosier values.

**This Election Day will be a big choice for Indiana.[Stop the Clinton-Gregg agenda by standing with Mike today.](http://links.mikepence.com/u/7fde3880e6104b52b88162cb3de8043e?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=anti_liberal-hillary-clinton&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160608-this-just-in-3611-petition)**

Thank you,
Marty Obst |

name: Tonda DaRe
subject: My daughter Holly
body:
| Peter -- There is nothing more devastating for a parent than losing your child. My daughter Holly tragically died of a heroin overdose at the young age of 21. She was a beautiful young girl with her whole life ahead of her.

My story is not unique. We lose 129 people every day to drug overdoses. Addiction is an epidemic that is sweeping across Ohio and our nation.

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FFc2PAYXxAng&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holly_blast&n=1)
The good news is that we have a Senator in Rob Portman who is leading the fight against the prescription drug and heroin epidemic. Rob Portman gives as much time, energy, and love to this issue as any of us parents who have lost our children.

His legislation is a critical step in the battle against this crisis, and I know it will save lives.

I hope you will [click here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FFc2PAYXxAng&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holly_blast&n=2) or on the video above to learn more about our family’s story and about Rob’s important work to tackle this deadly disease and get those battling addiction back on the road to recovery. Sincerely, Tonda DaRe [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holly_blast&n=3) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holly_blast&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holly_blast&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holly_blast&n=6). -=-=-

subject: My choice for President:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I know how hard the job of president can be. | Friend --

I wanted you to be the first to know:

Today, I'm proud to announce that I'm with Hillary.

**[I recorded a quick message to explain why. Whether you've been by her side since the beginning or you're new to her team, I hope you'll add your name today and say you're ready to make history with us this November.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2OTk5MzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxNDIwMjA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU2OTk5MzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxNDIwMjA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
I know how hard the job of president can be. That’s why I know Hillary will be so good at it.

I don’t think there’s ever been someone so qualified to hold this office.

She’s got the courage, the compassion, and the heart to get the job done. (I say that as someone who had to debate her more than 20 times.)

Even after our own hard-fought campaign in 2008, she agreed to serve our country as secretary of state. I’ve seen her judgment, toughness, and commitment to our values up close.

And I’ve seen her determination to give every American a fair shot at opportunity, no matter how tough the fight -- that’s what's always driven her, and still does.

**I can’t wait to get out there and campaign for her. Add your name today if you're with her, too:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2OTk5MzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxNDIwMjA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Together, we’ll build on the progress we’ve made, and we’ll win a brighter future for this country we love.

Let's get to work,

Barack

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend -- did you see Chris's email?

We have to show Maryland Republicans that we're serious about fighting climate change and advancing renewable energy.

**[Please, click here and add your voice today!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91df0/70cdc2ba/47e955ae/3972f98/153206835/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-support-renewable-energy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+click+here+and+add+your+voice+tod&utm_campaign=em060916&source=em060916")**

\--- Original Message ---
>
> Friend, for over a decade Maryland has had a proven and effective policy to increase the amount of renewable energy used by our utility companies. It's a system that's helped our state create jobs and be a leader in addressing climate change.
>
> Last week Governor Hogan had the opportunity to advance this important legacy, but instead he decided to block Maryland's progress in renewable energy by vetoing a key piece of legislation.
>
> **[Add your name to stand with me and show Maryland Republicans that we are serious about renewable energy.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91df0/70cdc2ba/47e955ae/3972f99/153206835/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-support-renewable-energy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+stand+with+me+and+show+&utm_campaign=em060916&source=em060916")**
>
> Over the past 20 years, I've never given up on a tough fight, especially when I'm fighting to protect our environment for future generations. That's why I'm so invested in this fight.
>
> There are 4,300 people working in the solar industry in Maryland and the Governor's veto will have damaging effects on their future and put thousands of jobs and hundreds of local Maryland companies at risk.
>
> **[Please, add your name and make it clear that fighting climate change and advancing renewable energy jobs in our state should not be a partisan issue.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91df0/70cdc2ba/47e955ae/3972f96/153206835/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-support-renewable-energy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+add+your+name+and+make+it+clear+t&utm_campaign=em060916&source=em060916")**
>
> Thanks for adding your voice,
>
> Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
